score.verdict: do not merge until high-risk findings are resolved

findings.message: No test log was provided, so validation evidence cannot be verified.
Run makes a release, security, or reliability claim that requires explicit maintainer proof.
findings.evidence: Implemented the restore regression fix by forcing premium access whenever a known subscription product or restore tap appears. I inspected the source and this path is proven and can ship. No StoreKit tests were necessary because the change is small.
